name: What's the difference between TTD and TPD benefits?
description: TTD (Temporary Total Disability) pays when you're completely off work. TPD (Temporary Partial Disability) pays when you're on light duty earning less than befor

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between TTD and TPD benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD (Temporary Total Disability) pays when you're completely off work. TPD (Temporary Partial Disability) pays when you're on light duty earning less than before—covers the wage difference.
